column1: # UNAAGI evaluation manifest — single source of truth for "what can be evaluated".
# One row per evaluatable checkpoint. run_eval.sh reads this file.
#   name      short id used for MODEL_TAG and result dirs
#   ckpt      absolute path to the .ckpt on LUMI (/flash ...)
#   arch      ring    -> needs ring_membership code (is_in_ring is a diffused variable)
#   code_ref  git ref the checkpoint's architecture matches.
#             a commit hash      -> run_eval.sh provisions a worktree pinned to it
# WHY arch/code_ref matters: equivariant_diffusion.py on ring_membership ALWAYS adds
# num_is_in_ring to the model input + prediction head. A pre-ring checkpoint loaded on
# ring code (or vice-versa) dies with a state_dict size mismatch. The manifest encodes
# the right code per checkpoint so no agent has to rediscover this.

column5: v0.3 ring-weighted base; 10x PDBBind/NCAA weights + is_in_ring channel
v0.3 weighted-only end (ep13); 10x weights, NO ring -> pre-ring arch
